text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Fuji Kiseki and I are at a loss for how to
overcome the pressure she's feeling. We watch a
DVD of one of her mother's performances in the
hopes we can find a hint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Surely, even she must feel pressured as a stage actor. But as we watch, she doesn't give off that impression. Fuji Kiseki can't figure out why.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest we ask her mother directly how she's
able to keep her cool on stage, and Fuji Kiseki
agrees. We settle on a date to meet her mother.
